generated_oml:
instance MotorEncoder : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Motor encoder mounted directly on the permanent magnet synchronous motor of MABI MAX 100 robot first axis"
    DTDFVocab:producedData MotorEncoderDataTransmitted
]

instance SecondaryEncoder : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Secondary encoder mounted behind the cycloidal gearbox of MABI MAX 100 robot first axis"
    DTDFVocab:producedData SecondaryEncoderDataTransmitted
]

instance InputCurrentSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Sensor measuring input current to the permanent magnet synchronous motor"
    DTDFVocab:producedData InputCurrentDataTransmitted
]

instance PermanentMagnetSynchronousMotor : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Permanent magnet synchronous motor converting electrical current to rotational torque"
]

instance Gearwheel : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Gearwheel component converting rotational torque in the first axis of MABI MAX 100 robot"
]

instance CycloidalGearbox : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Cycloidal gearbox component converting rotational torque in the first axis of MABI MAX 100 robot"
]

instance MotorEncoderDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom MotorEncoder
]

instance SecondaryEncoderDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom SecondaryEncoder
]

instance InputCurrentDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom InputCurrentSensor
]

instance MotorEncoderPositionData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Position data from motor encoder"
    DTDFVocab:fromData MotorEncoderDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulinkEnabler
]

instance SecondaryEncoderPositionData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Position data from secondary encoder behind gearbox"
    DTDFVocab:fromData SecondaryEncoderDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulinkEnabler
]

instance InputCurrentData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Input current data from sensor"
    DTDFVocab:fromData InputCurrentDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulinkEnabler
]

instance MeasuredTorqueData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Measured torque data derived from input current and motor position"
    DTDFVocab:fromData InputCurrentDataTransmitted, MotorEncoderDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulinkEnabler
]

instance SimulatedTorqueData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Simulated torque data from friction models"
    DTDFVocab:fromData InputCurrentDataTransmitted, MotorEncoderDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulinkEnabler
]

instance MeasuredAngularVelocityData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Measured angular velocity data from motor encoder"
    DTDFVocab:fromData MotorEncoderDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulinkEnabler
]

instance SimulatedAngularVelocityData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Simulated angular velocity data from friction models"
    DTDFVocab:fromData InputCurrentDataTransmitted, MotorEncoderDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulinkEnabler
]

instance SysML_BlockDefinitionDiagram : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "SysML Block Definition Diagram for structural model of MABI MAX 100 robot first axis"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo AssetAdministrationShell
]

instance SysML_InternalBlockDiagram : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "SysML Internal Block Diagram for structural model of MABI MAX 100 robot first axis"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo AssetAdministrationShell
]

instance CoulombViscousFrictionModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Simulink simulation model for Coulomb and viscous friction characteristics"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulinkEnabler
]

instance StribeckFrictionModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Simulink simulation model for Stribeck friction characteristics"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulinkEnabler
]

instance DahlFrictionModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Simulink simulation model for Dahl friction characteristics"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulinkEnabler
]

instance LuGreFrictionModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Simulink simulation model for LuGre friction characteristics"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulinkEnabler
]

instance SysMLEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "SysML for structural modeling"
]

instance SimulinkEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "MathWorks Simulink for friction model simulation"
    DTDFVocab:enables FrictionIdentificationService
]

instance AssetAdministrationShell : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Asset Administration Shell for digital twin asset management"
    DTDFVocab:enables FrictionIdentificationService
]

instance MQTTEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "MQTT protocol for streaming sensor data to digital twin"
    DTDFVocab:enables FrictionIdentificationService
]

instance SiemensSINUMERIK840DslCNCControllerEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Siemens SINUMERIK 840D sl CNC controller for motor control"
    DTDFVocab:enables MotionAccuracyEnhancementService
]

instance DashboardVisualizationEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Dashboard visualization tool for real-time monitoring"
    DTDFVocab:enables DashboardVisualizationService
]

instance FrictionIdentificationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Continuous identification of joint friction using white-box and black-box models"
    DTDFVocab:provides FrictionInsight
]

instance DashboardVisualizationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Integrated visualization of friction data in dashboard"
    DTDFVocab:provides VisualizationInsight
]

instance MotionAccuracyEnhancementService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Enhancement of robot motion accuracy through model-based control algorithms"
    DTDFVocab:provides MotionAccuracyAction
]

instance FrictionInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Insights on joint friction characteristics used for control algorithm improvement"
]

instance VisualizationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Real-time visualization of friction and motion data"
]

instance MotionAccuracyAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Automatic adjustment of control parameters to improve motion accuracy"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

instance MABIMAX100FirstAxisEnvironment : DTDFVocab:Environment [
    base:contains PermanentMagnetSynchronousMotor, Gearwheel, CycloidalGearbox, MotorEncoder, SecondaryEncoder, InputCurrentSensor
]

instance twinning_time_scale : DTDFVocab:TimeScale [
    base:desc "Real-time data processing with live measurements and continuous updates for friction model identification."
]

instance dt_constellation : DTDFVocab:Constellation [
    base:desc "Integration of structural and behavioral models with live operational data, processed through simulation components and visualized in a unified dashboard for real-time friction analysis."
]

instance life_cycle_stages : DTDFVocab:EvolutionStage [
    base:desc "As operated, capturing real-time operational data including wear and variations due to different tools or applications."
]

instance fidelity_and_validity_considerations : DTDFVocab:FidelityConsideration [
    base:desc "Validation through comparison of simulated versus measured data to identify deviations in joint friction; multi-physics-aware models considering load, temperature, and time dependencies."
]

instance dt_technical_connection : DTDFVocab:TechnicalConnection [
    base:desc "MQTT protocol for real-time sensor data transmission from physical system to digital shadow."
]

instance standardization : DTDFVocab:Standardization [
    base:desc "Adherence to Asset Administration Shell (AAS) standards for industrial asset representation and SysML for model-based systems engineering."
]
